name: linkgov-institutional
description: Plataforma institucional de agregador de links com painel administrativo e API Cloudflare.

scripts.cf:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply linkgov-db --config wrangler.worker.jsonc --local
scripts.cf:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply linkgov-db --config wrangler.worker.jsonc --remote
scripts.cf:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply linkgov-db-staging --config wrangler.worker.jsonc --env staging --remote
scripts.cf:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply linkgov-db-production --config wrangler.worker.jsonc --env production --remote
scripts.deploy:web: vite build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name linkgov-institutional
scripts.deploy:web:staging: vite build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name linkgov-institutional --branch staging
scripts.deploy:web:production: vite build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name linkgov-institutional --branch main
